hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const target=i.tool_input?.file_path||i.tool_input?.pattern||i.tool_input?.path||'';if(target.includes('.decisions/records')||target.includes('.decisions/deferred')){console.error('[Hippocampus] Do not read decision files directly.\nUse the query command instead:\n  cd hippocampus && npm run hippocampus:query -- \'describe what you need\'');process.exit(2)}process.stdout.write(d)})"
hooks.description: Block direct reads of decision records — use hippocampus:query instead
Reset write counter when hippocampus:log is called

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const fs=require('fs');const cf=require('path').join(process.cwd(),'.decisions','.write-counter');let n=0;try{n=parseInt(fs.readFileSync(cf,'utf8'))||0}catch(e){}n++;try{fs.writeFileSync(cf,String(n))}catch(e){}if(n>=5)console.error('[Hippocampus] '+n+' writes since last decision log. At a fork? Log it now: cd hippocampus && npm run hippocampus:log -- description --autonomous');process.stdout.write(d)})"
hooks.description: Nudge agent to log decisions after 5 consecutive writes without a log call
